Bookmark rules: When traversing, compare nodes with Equals or reference equality to stop before the end bookmark.
Use Bookmark.BookmarkStart and Bookmark.BookmarkEnd to obtain the underlying nodes (the Bookmark class does not expose Start/End properties).
Validate that both bookmarks exist before accessing their nodes.
Keep the extraction inclusive of both bookmark boundaries, as required by the task.
Always verify that required bookmarks exist before accessing them to avoid NullReferenceException.
When iterating nodes with NextPreOrder, stop before the end bookmark to keep the range exclusive.
Document merge/insert rules: Remove the non‑existent namespace import `using Aspose.Words.Paragraphs;` – the `Paragraph` class resides directly in `Aspose.Words`.
Do not import namespaces that do not exist in the Aspose.Words for .NET library (e.g., Aspose.Words.Import).
Loading rules: Use the overload Node.NextPreOrder(Node rootNode) and pass the document (or any node that is the root of the tree) as the argument.
Add the required using directive: Aspose.Words.Loading.
Saving/Export rules: Use HtmlLoadOptions (Aspose.Words.Loading) instead of generic LoadOptions when loading HTML with a BaseUri.
Keep the load, create, and save operations as provided (Document(string), new Document(), Document.Save(string)).
Images/Shapes/OLE rules: Set BaseUri on HtmlLoadOptions to resolve relative image paths.
Keep the rest of the logic unchanged – iterate Shape nodes, check HasImage, and save ImageData.
Layout rules: Ensure the destination document contains at least one Section and Body before appending nodes.
